description: Visible, named parts of components as defined by designers. These are the parts called out in component specification diagrams. Styling surfaces (background, border, etc.) belong in token-objects.json; positional terms (top, bottom, etc.) belong in positions.json. Note: some terms (e.g. button, checkbox, accordion) share an ID with a component registry entry — this is intentional when the same element appears as both a standalone component and a named anatomy part within another component.

values.label: Text
values.description: Text content or labels

values.label: Control
values.description: Interactive control elements like checkboxes or radio buttons

values.label: Icon
values.description: Icon elements

values.label: Label
values.description: Text labels

values.label: Body
values.description: Main body or content container

values.label: Header
values.description: Header section

values.label: Footer
values.description: Footer section

values.label: Divider
values.description: Dividing line or separator

values.label: Handle
values.description: Draggable handle element

values.label: Indicator
values.description: Visual indicator or marker

values.label: Track
values.description: Track or rail element (e.g., in sliders)

values.label: Thumb
values.description: Draggable thumb element (e.g., in sliders)

values.label: Avatar
values.description: User avatar or profile image

values.label: Badge
values.description: Badge or notification indicator

values.label: Pill
values.description: Pill-shaped element

values.label: Title
values.description: Title text element within a component

values.label: Description
values.description: Descriptive text element within a component

values.label: Row
values.description: Table or list row element

values.label: Step
values.description: Individual step element in a step list or wizard

values.label: Counter
values.description: Numeric counter or badge element

values.label: Preview
values.description: Preview area or thumbnail within a component

values.label: Tip
values.description: Tooltip tip or arrow element

values.label: Selection
values.description: Selection indicator or highlight element

values.label: Media
values.description: Media container (image, video) within a component

values.label: Ring
values.description: Focus ring or outline indicator

values.label: Field
values.description: Input container element in form components (text-field, number-field, combo-box, picker, etc.)

values.label: Fill
values.description: Active/completed portion of a track-based component (slider, meter, progress-bar, progress-circle)

values.label: Value
values.description: Displayed data value within a component (numeric readout, selected text, menu item value)

values.label: Container
values.description: Outer wrapper element of a component (cards, swatch, thumbnail, avatar)

values.label: Chevron
values.description: Directional arrow indicator (disclosure, navigation, drill-in)

values.label: Loupe
values.description: Magnified color preview element in color components (color-area, color-slider, color-wheel)

values.label: Dot
values.description: Small circular indicator element (status-light)

values.label: Separator
values.description: Visual separator between items (breadcrumbs)

values.label: Checkmark
values.description: Check or confirmation icon element within a component

values.label: Stepper
values.description: Increment/decrement control in number-field

values.label: Area
values.description: Interactive surface region (color-area gradient surface)

values.label: Gripper
values.description: Draggable resize handle element (standard-panel)

values.label: Illustration
values.description: Decorative or explanatory illustration within a component

values.label: Heading
values.description: Heading text element within a component section

values.label: Focus Ring
values.description: Visible ring drawn around a focused component for accessibility

values.label: Focus Indicator
values.description: Visual indicator showing keyboard focus state on a component

values.label: Workflow Icon
values.description: Standard workflow icon element within a component (distinct from UI icons)

values.label: UI Icon
values.description: System UI icon element (chevrons, checkmarks, close icons) within a component

values.label: Action Button
values.description: An action button used as a named part within another component (e.g. tag-group toolbar, tree-view item actions)

values.label: Action Menu
values.description: Overflow action menu within a component (e.g. action-group overflow)

values.label: Button
values.description: A button element used as a named anatomy part within another component (e.g. drop-zone CTA, alert-banner action)

values.label: Button Group
values.description: A grouped set of action buttons, typically in dialog footers or coach-mark controls

values.label: Close Button
values.description: Dismiss or close button element within a component (dialogs, alerts, tags, panels)

values.label: Back Button
values.description: Back-navigation button within a panel or multi-step component

values.label: Hold Icon
values.description: Small indicator icon on action-button signaling a hold interaction is available

values.label: Actions
values.description: Group of action controls within a list item or tree node (action buttons, icon buttons)

values.label: List Item
values.description: Individual row within a list-view component

values.label: Menu Item
values.description: Individual selectable item within a menu

values.label: Section Header
values.description: Label separating a named group of items within a menu or list-view

values.label: Section Divider
values.description: Visual line separating sections within a menu or list

values.label: Section Description
values.description: Optional descriptive text accompanying a menu or list section header

values.label: Drill-in Chevron
values.description: Chevron icon indicating a sub-menu or drill-in navigation action on a menu item

values.label: Link-out Icon
values.description: Icon indicating a menu item opens an external link in a new context

values.label: Trailing Icon
values.description: Icon placed at the trailing (end) edge of a list item or row

values.label: Thumbnail
values.description: Small image preview element used as a named part within list, menu, or card components

values.label: Checkbox
values.description: Checkbox control used as a named anatomy part within another component (list-view, cards, tree-view)

values.label: Switch
values.description: Toggle switch used as a named anatomy part within another component (e.g. menu item)

values.label: Popover
values.description: Popover shell used as a named anatomy part within another component (menu, contextual-help)

values.label: Help Text
values.description: Instructional or error message text displayed below a form field

values.label: Character Count
values.description: Remaining-character counter shown in text-field and text-area components

values.label: Necessity Indicator
values.description: Label or asterisk indicating whether a field is required or optional (field-label, combo-box)

values.label: Required Asterisk
values.description: Asterisk symbol denoting a required form field (text-field, picker, number-field)

values.label: Required Text
values.description: Text label (e.g. 'Required') denoting a required form field

values.label: Validation Marker
values.description: Icon or mark indicating valid input state on a form field

values.label: Error Icon
values.description: Icon indicating an error state on a form field (text-field, picker, number-field)

values.label: Placeholder
values.description: Placeholder text shown in a form field before a value is selected or entered

values.label: In-field Button
values.description: Button rendered inside a field element (e.g. clear button in search-field, calendar trigger in date-picker)

values.label: Leading Icon
values.description: Icon placed at the leading (start) edge inside a field (e.g. search icon in search-field)

values.label: Field Label
values.description: Field label component used as a named anatomy part within a group component (checkbox-group, radio-group, tag-field)

values.label: Input
values.description: The actual input control(s) associated with a field-label component

values.label: Menu Container
values.description: Container element that holds the dropdown menu in picker and combo-box

values.label: Date Field
values.description: Date input component used as an anatomy part within a date-picker

values.label: Time Field
values.description: Time input component used as an anatomy part within a date-picker

values.label: Calendar
values.description: Calendar component used as an anatomy part within a date-picker

values.label: Segmented Control Item
values.description: Individual selectable item within a segmented-control component

values.label: Color Handle
values.description: Draggable handle element in color picker components (color-area, color-slider, color-wheel)

values.label: Swatch
values.description: Individual color swatch element used as an anatomy part within a swatch-group

values.label: Tag
values.description: Tag element used as an anatomy part within tag-group and tag-field

values.label: Text Area
values.description: Scrollable text input region used as an anatomy part within tag-field

values.label: Image
values.description: Image element used as a named anatomy part within thumbnail, avatar, or dialog components

values.label: Link
values.description: Inline link element used as a named anatomy part within contextual-help or similar components

values.label: Overlay
values.description: Semi-transparent backdrop element behind modal dialogs (alert-dialog, standard-dialog, takeover-dialog)

values.label: Header Area
values.description: Distinct header region within a dialog or panel component

values.label: Body Area
values.description: Main content region within a dialog, panel, or in-line-alert component

values.label: Footer Area
values.description: Distinct footer region within a dialog or card component

values.label: Header Content
values.description: Optional content placed within the header area of a dialog or panel

values.label: Footer Content
values.description: Optional content placed within the footer area of a dialog

values.label: Cover Image
values.description: Large decorative image at the top of a standard dialog

values.label: Primary Action
values.description: Primary call-to-action button within a dialog or alert component

values.label: Secondary Action
values.description: Secondary action button within a dialog component

values.label: Cancel Action
values.description: Cancel or dismiss action button within a dialog component

values.label: Column Header
values.description: Header cell of a table column, typically containing a label and optional sort control

values.label: Sort Icon
values.description: Icon indicating sort direction on a table column header

values.label: Column Divider
values.description: Vertical separator between table columns

values.label: Row Divider
values.description: Horizontal separator between table rows

values.label: Cell
values.description: Individual data cell within a table row

values.label: Preview Well
values.description: Preview/asset display area within a card component

values.label: Metadata
values.description: Supplemental metadata content area within a card component

values.label: Accordion
values.description: Accordion component used as an anatomy part within a panel (standard-panel)

values.label: Tab Item
values.description: Individual tab button within a tabs component

values.label: Breadcrumb Item
values.description: Individual item in a breadcrumbs navigation trail

values.label: Breadcrumb Title
values.description: Current-page title element at the end of a breadcrumbs trail

values.label: Truncated Menu
values.description: Overflow menu replacing collapsed breadcrumb items when space is limited

values.label: Accordion Item
values.description: Individual collapsible section within an accordion component

values.label: Small Divider
values.description: Thin divider line between accordion items

values.label: Item
values.description: Generic individual item element within a list, navigation, or container component (use a more specific term such as accordion-item, list-item, or tab-item where available)

values.label: Tree View Item
values.description: Individual node element within a tree-view component

values.label: Disclosure Button
values.description: Collapse/expand toggle button on a tree-view item or accordion item

values.label: Drag Icon
values.description: Drag handle icon on a reorderable tree-view item

values.label: Context Area
values.description: Optional icon or thumbnail context slot on the leading edge of a tree-view item

values.label: Step Item
values.description: Individual step node within a steplist component

values.label: User Image
values.description: User profile photo displayed within an avatar component

values.label: Initials
values.description: Text initials displayed in an avatar when no image is available

values.label: Guest Icon
values.description: Icon displayed in an avatar representing an unauthenticated guest user

values.label: Disclosure Triangle
values.description: Expand/collapse indicator for accordion, tree, or disclosure components

values.label: Picker
values.description: Dropdown trigger area — the visible affordance, not the overlay

values.label: Progress Bar
values.description: Visual progress fill track indicating completion level
